title: Rehire {{employeeName}}
subtitle: Schedule a return to work date and confirm where this employee will work.

startDate.label: Start date
startDate.description: The day the employee returns to work.

workAddress.label: Work address
workAddress.description: The address where this employee will report to work.

fileNewHireReport.label: File a new hire report
fileNewHireReport.description: Required in most states when rehiring after a separation of 60 days or more.

options.yes: Yes, file a new hire report

validation.fileNewHireReportRequired: Please select whether to file a new hire report
